{
  "name": "@advert/android",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "main": "index.ts",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "expo start",
    "android": "expo run:android",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "build:apk": "eas build --platform android --profile preview",
    "build:aab": "eas build --platform android --profile production",
    "ios": "expo run:ios"
